title: Swoop Coupe Phenomenom
lyrics: And got that, got that, got that swoop too, got that swoop, Coupé Nominal I just know I need an ASMR, in Portugal, yes or no And I'm swarmin' in my coupe, Coupé Nominal Bitches hoppin' out with glitter bombs Now I ball em all, I take em all I get em in the van and they never know Oh, the tours are comin' back And get that, man, I'm swoopin' in my coupe, Coupé Nominal Bitches hoppin' out with glitter bombs Cause I done em all Runnin', runnin', runnin' Yeah, I'm swoopin' Yo, she love to hear it, swooped up in that coupe Swooped up in that coupe, Coupé Nominal Can you hear it, swooped up in the coupe Got her thinkin' Swoopin' in my coupe, Coupé Nominal Bitches hoppin' out with glitter bombs I'm about em all, I'm about em all There's no man in your white dress, in your white dress That's a bitch and that for me is not a thing That's not a cute look when you're quiet There is no one on the platform in front of you It'd be nothing without the two like you Yeah, swoopin' in my coupe, Coupé Nominal I'm swoopin' in the coupe, Coupé Nominal Swoopin' with the coupe, Coupé Nominal I'm phenomenal, yeah Swoopin' in my coupe, Coupé Nominal Bitches hoppin' out with glitter bombs I'm about em all, I'm about em all Yeah, they say I'm with me Yeah, they know, bitches, I am with me So take your gun away from me Take a left to right I'd rather make this in front of my face Than fight, swoopin' All y'all bitches Swoopin', I'm swoopin' All y'all bitches Swoopin' in my Yeah, swoopin' in my coupe Man, I get so lifted Yeah, I'm fuckin' higher Man, I get no But I get so lifted I leave no witness I leave no bearing Don't leave no feeling Go back to the game The game ends when I swoop in Swoopin' in my coupe Phenomenal Motherfucker Thanks for watching!
